channel.title: Apt-Get on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Apt-Get on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Debian a upgrady na vyššie verzie
item.description: Upgrade z Debian 11 na 12 Postup ktorý mi fungoval z verzie Debian 11 Bullseye na Debian 12 Bookworm. apt update apt upgrade sed -i 's/bullseye/bookworm/g' /etc/apt/sources.list apt update apt upgrade --without-new-pkgs apt full-upgrade reboot\

item.title: Obnovenie certifikátov pre repozitáre
item.description: sudo apt-key list | \\ grep "expired: " | \\ sed -ne 's|pub .*/\([^ ]*\) .*|\1|gp' | \\ xargs -n1 sudo apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv-keys
